content_body: My husband and I spent the first two days on our own, with our almost, 4-year-old son joining us for the second half of the visit. We saw the most impressive firework display on the 4th! We played lots of air hockey and a card game war, roasted marshmallows, relaxed, and had lots of family fun. Thanks for sharing this wonderful place with us!
title: Family Fun on the Fourth of July in Blue Ridge, GA
